queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, COALESCE(facility_zone, 'UNKNOWN_ZONE') AS safe_zone, CONCAT(sorter_model, ' @ ', control_center) AS sorter_op_label FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 12

expected.note: COALESCE + CONCAT combining sorter and facility zone

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, re_match(log, 'warehouse|event') AS matched, split_part(log, ' ', 1) AS first_word FROM "{stream}" WHERE log IS NOT NULL ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT _timestamp, UPPER(pallet_id) AS pallet_upper, LOWER(conveyor_lane) AS lane_lower, CONCAT(sorter_model, '-', operation_mode) AS sorter_op, TRIM(COALESCE(build_signature, '')) AS clean_build, LENGTH(CONCAT(facility_zone, '-', control_center)) AS label_len FROM "{stream}" WHERE pallet_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 12

expected.note: 5 string functions: UPPER, LOWER, CONCAT, TRIM+COALESCE, LENGTH+CONCAT

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, re_match(pallet_id, 'PL-00[1-4]') AS is_front_pallet, split_part(pallet_id, '-', 1) AS prefix, split_part(pallet_id, '-', 2) AS suffix_num FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(pallet_id, 'PL-00[1-8]') = TRUE ORDER BY suffix_num ASC

expected.note: re_match with regex character class + split_part on dash delimiter

queries.sql: SELECT control_center, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT sorter_model, ' | ' ORDER BY sorter_model ASC) AS sorter_models, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT operation_mode, ', ') AS op_modes, COUNT(*) AS event_cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE control_center IS NOT NULL GROUP BY control_center HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ORDER BY event_cnt DESC

expected.note: STRING_AGG with DISTINCT + ORDER BY, second STRING_AGG for another column

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, build_signature, SUBSTR(build_signature, 1, 8) AS build_prefix, SUBSTR(build_signature, 10, 2) AS build_suffix, REPLACE(build_signature, 'BS-', 'BUILD_') AS replaced_sig FROM "{stream}" WHERE build_signature LIKE 'BS-2026-%' ORDER BY build_signature ASC, _timestamp ASC

expected.note: SUBSTR (two positions) + REPLACE + LIKE pattern filter

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, conveyor_lane, facility_zone, LOWER(CONCAT(SUBSTR(conveyor_lane, 1, 4), '-', SUBSTR(facility_zone, 5, 1))) AS short_code, CASE WHEN re_match(CONCAT(conveyor_lane, '-', facility_zone), 'LANE-[AB]-ZONE-[12]') THEN 'core' ELSE 'edge' END AS location_type FROM "{stream}" WHERE conveyor_lane IS NOT NULL AND facility_zone IS NOT NULL ORDER BY location_type ASC, short_code ASC

expected.note: Nested: LOWER(CONCAT(SUBSTR, SUBSTR)) + CASE with re_match on CONCAT result

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, sorter_model, COALESCE(sorter_model, 'UNKNOWN_SORTER') AS safe_sorter, NULLIF(sorter_model, 'SORT-Q5') AS exclude_q5, COALESCE(NULLIF(sorter_model, 'SORT-Q5'), 'FILTERED') AS filtered_sorter FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 12

SELECT _timestamp, log, pallet_id, re_match(log, 'warehouse|event') AS has_keyword, re_match(log, '[0-9]+') AS has_digit, LENGTH(log) AS msg_length, POSITION('record' IN log) AS record_pos FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(log, 'warehouse') = TRUE ORDER BY msg_length DESC LIMIT 12

expected.note: re_match (two patterns) + LENGTH + POSITION on log field

queries.sql: SELECT facility_zone, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT CONCAT(operation_mode, ':', CAST(ROUND(throughput_rate, 0) AS VARCHAR)), '; ' ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS mode_tput_list, COUNT(DISTINCT operation_mode) AS distinct_modes FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY distinct_modes DESC

expected.note: STRING_AGG with CONCAT of mode + rounded throughput, ORDER BY inside STRING_AGG — zero rows, columns unverifiable
